title: Data Privacy & Compliance
concept: Handling user requests to delete or export stored agent memories, and PHI/PII redacting.

exercises.prompt: What is memory drift in AI agents?

options.text: When an agent learns new things better than it remembers the old ones.
When an agent starts to remember incorrect facts or outdated beliefs.
When an agent switches between different memories easily.

exercises.explain: Memory drift happens when an AI agent begins to remember incorrect facts or beliefs, leading to potential misunderstandings or errors.

cards.title: Protecting User Data
cards.body: Data privacy means keeping user information safe. In this lesson, we'll learn how to handle requests to delete or export memories securely.

cards.title: Data Privacy & Compliance
cards.body: Data privacy refers to the proper handling of sensitive information, ensuring it's not misused. Compliance means following rules about how to manage that data.

cards.title: Key to a Safe Box
cards.body: Think of data privacy like having a safe box for your treasure. Just as you wouldn't want anyone to peek inside, you only let trusted people access your data.

cards.title: Memory Requests
cards.body: When a user asks to delete their memories, it's like saying, 'I want my treasure gone.' You must follow the right steps to ensure it’s securely removed.

cards.title: Myth: All Data Can Be Shared Freely
cards.body: Not all data can be shared! User information is sensitive and must be handled with care to maintain their trust and privacy.

cards.title: Visualizing Data Handling
cards.body: Handling user requests involves careful steps.

left.text: Follow secure procedures to erase memory.

exercises.prompt: What is a key step when deleting user memories?

options.text: Notify the user about the deletion process.
Ensure the memory is permanently unrecoverable.
Store the deleted memories for backup.
Ask for more personal information from the user.

exercises.explain: When deleting user memories, it's important to ensure that the data is permanently unrecoverable to protect their privacy.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Compliance means ignoring user requests for data deletion.
exercises.explain: Compliance means following the rules, which includes respecting and acting on user requests for data deletion.

exercises.prompt: When a user asks to export their memories, you should provide them with _DATA_ in a clear format.
exercises.sentence: When a user asks to export their memories, you should provide them with data in a clear format.
exercises.explain: Providing the user with their data helps ensure transparency and respect for their privacy.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following actions is an AI agent required to take when a user requests their information be deleted?

options.text: Delete all agent memories immediately without confirmation.
Ignore the request if it involves personal information.
Confirm the deletion process with the user before proceeding.

exercises.explain: Confirming the deletion process with the user ensures that their request is understood and handled properly, maintaining compliance with privacy standards.

exercises.prompt: What is the best way to handle a user request for their memories to be deleted?

options.text: Inform the user about the deletion policy and confirm their request.
Ask for their account password before proceeding with the deletion.
Store the information temporarily before deleting it.

exercises.explain: Informing the user about the deletion policy and confirming their request ensures that you respect their choice while maintaining data privacy.
